query:
SELECT 
  ar.id,
  ar.actionId,
  ar.solicitanteId,
  ar.status,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM actions WHERE id = ar.actionId) as action_exists,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE id = ar.solicitanteId) as user_exists
FROM adjustment_requests ar;
